message:
fix(matrix): map NotFound to ResourceNotFound instead of InvalidRequest{1004}

M_NOT_FOUND / HTTP 404 from Matrix homeservers was incorrectly mapped
to FcpError::InvalidRequest with code 1004 (the "unknown operation"
code). The correct FCP error variant is ResourceNotFound, which lets
agents distinguish "resource doesn't exist" from "malformed request".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
